headline: Duke Energy Foundation invests $773,000 to strengthen STEM education in Florida
summary: The Duke Energy Foundation is awarding $773,000 to 22 nonprofit organizations and higher education institutions working to strengthen STEM education by expanding access to hands-on learning opportunities and helping prepare Florida students for careers in high-demand industries.

headline: 6 Market Experts Sound Off On AI, Tech, Hot IPOs, And Top Stocks For 2026
summary: With questions swirling on AI and tech stocks, hot IPOs, Fed policy, and ongoing tensions in the Middle East, where is an investor to turn? Six experts share their advice and recommendations
